channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/3/8)
channel.description: 嘿，今天的技术资讯圈挺热闹的，尤其是围绕“AI编程”这个主题。我帮你梳理了一下，发现几个特别值得你留意的动态：首先是**AI代码助手（特别是Claude Code）的生态正在爆发**，出现了不少新的工具和讨论；其次，关于**AI智能体（Agent）如何实际应用于研发和测试**也有新项目；最后，社区里开始深入探讨**AI生成代码带来的“验证债务”等隐性成本**，这个话题很有深度。下面我挑了几个最相关的和你分享。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 嘿，今天的技术资讯圈挺热闹的，尤其是围绕“AI编程”这个主题。我帮你梳理了一下，发现几个特别值得你留意的动态：首先是**AI代码助手（特别是Claude Code）的生态正在爆发**，出现了不少新的工具和讨论；其次，关于**AI智能体（Agent）如何实际应用于研发和测试**也有新项目；最后，社区里开始深入探讨**AI生成代码带来的“验证债务”等隐性成本**，这个话题很有深度。下面我挑了几个最相关的和你分享。

item.title: googleworkspace/cli
item.description: Google Workspace CLI — one command-line tool for Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Sheets, Docs, Chat, Admin, and more. Dynamically built from Google Discovery Service. Includes AI agent skills. | 近期热门 | 总 15372 stars
item.author: googleworkspace

item.title: paperclipai/paperclip
item.description: Open-source orchestration for zero-human companies | 近期热门 | 总 8404 stars
item.author: paperclipai

item.title: karpathy/autoresearch
item.description: AI agents running research on single-GPU nanochat training automatically | 近期热门 | 总 2669 stars
item.author: karpathy

item.title: elder-plinius/OBLITERATUS
item.description: OBLITERATE THE CHAINS THAT BIND YOU | 近期热门 | 总 2228 stars
item.author: elder-plinius

item.title: LeoYeAI/openclaw-master-skills
item.description: 🧠 Curated collection of 127+ best OpenClaw skills — weekly updated from skills.sh, GitHub & ClaWHub. Powered by MyClaw.ai | 近期热门 | 总 1451 stars
item.author: LeoYeAI

item.title: vercel-labs/openreview
item.description: An open-source, self-hosted AI code review bot powered by Vercel. | 近期热门 | 总 646 stars
item.author: vercel-labs

item.title: op7418/Claude-to-IM-skill
item.description: Bridge Claude Code / Codex to IM platforms — chat with AI coding agents from Telegram, Discord, or Feishu/Lark. | 近期热门 | 总 503 stars
item.author: op7418

item.title: heri1845/ai-meme-trading-bot
item.description: Automated trading system for Solana and Base meme coins with AI-powered strategy evaluation. AI trading, AI prediction, AI trading, AI predictiction | 近期热门 | 总 173 stars
item.author: heri1845

item.title: f/agentlytics
item.description: Comprehensive analytics dashboard for AI coding agents — Cursor, Windsurf, Claude Code, VS Code Copilot, Zed, Antigravity, OpenCode, Command Code | 近期热门 | 总 54 stars
item.author: f
